title: Supply Chain Manager - Rivigo - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rivigo - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
